CONT 2/24/95 AT 9AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL

CONT TO 2/15/95 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22

MARSDEN MO DEN;TRANSF TO D22 F/W
BAIL SET 7500;
